testimonials.testimonial: I love my Hog Splitter Pro! With a regular stopwatch, I was regularly forgetting to reset it after timing a rock, or forgetting what the time was 1 or 2 rocks ago. With Hog Splitter Pro, I get all the information I need without having to do anything more than press the big button when the rock crosses a line. Highly recommend!
I hadn't timed rocks with a stopwatch before, but the features on Hog Splitter Pro sounded interesting. Now I can't imagine using anything else! Having the last couple rocks' times is so helpful!

Hog Splitter Pro is a game changer. As a skip I value hog to hog times to feedback hit weights to my team and track the speed of the ice. But with a traditional stopwatch I too often reset it before looking at the time, or I forget the time when my teammate asks. This stopwatch has exactly what I need and nothing else to get in the way. I won’t step onto the ice without my Hog Splitter Pro.
The Hog Splitter is the best stopwatch for curling I've ever used. I used to forget to clear my old times and mess up my current timing but now that's a thing of the past!

In gameplay and practice, I have the found the Hog Splitter Pro to be unmatched. With its one-button controls and large display, I never miss a split or hog-to-hog time like I would with other stopwatches on the market. The Hog Splitter Pro is the only stopwatch choice for competitive curlers.
